name: www.dayline.observer
description: A web application that displays weather, EDB alerts, and air quality information for Hong Kong.

scripts.test: npm run test:jest && npm run test:pw
scripts.build: mkdirp dist && ncp resources dist/resources && terser app.js -o dist/app.js --compress --mangle && cleancss style.css -o dist/style.css && html-minifier-terser index.html --collapse-whitespace --remove-comments --remove-redundant-attributes --remove-script-type-attributes --use-short-doctype --minify-js true --minify-css true -o dist/index.html
